CREATE TABLE source_table1 (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255));
CREATE TABLE source_table2 (id INT PRIMARY KEY, description TEXT);
CREATE VIEW linked_data_view AS SELECT s1.id, s1.name, s2.description FROM source_table1 s1 JOIN source_table2 s2 ON s1.id = s2.id;

CREATE TRIGGER trg_instead ON linked_data_view INSTEAD OF INSERT AS BEGIN INSERT INTO source_table1 (id, name) VALUES (NEW.id, NEW.name); INSERT INTO source_table2 (id, description) VALUES (NEW.id, NEW.description); END;
SELECT id, name FROM source_table1 WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM source_table2 WHERE description LIKE '%example%');
SELECT s.id, s.name, v.description FROM (SELECT id, name FROM source_table1) s LEFT JOIN linked_data_view v ON s.id = v.id;
SELECT id, name FROM source_table1 WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM source_table2 WHERE source_table2.id = source_table1.id);
CREATE TABLE source_table3 (id INT PRIMARY KEY, info VARCHAR(255));
SELECT DISTINCT s.id FROM source_table1 s JOIN source_table2 d ON s.id = d.id UNION SELECT DISTINCT s.id FROM source_table3 s;
CREATE VIEW another_view AS SELECT s1.id, s1.name, s2.description FROM source_table1 s1 FULL OUTER JOIN source_table2 s2 ON s1.id = s2.id;
